content: Language education's reflective writing pedagogy (rooted in the reflexion learning framework from high school English curricula) can be repurposed to build the structured self-reflection loop that powers autonomous Reflexion AI agents, creating a human-aligned improvement cycle for agentic behavior. Just as students refine their arguments and meta-cognitive awareness through repeated reflective writing exercises, autonomous agents can iteratively debug their own decision-making by formulating written reflections on past task failures, similar to how students reflect on their own writing drafts.
